name: Outreach Daily Report — v2 Native N8N

parameters.query:
WITH yesterday_data AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(sent_count)::int        AS sent,
    SUM(replied_count)::int     AS replied,
    SUM(positive_reply_count)::int AS positive,
    SUM(bounced_count)::int     AS bounced,
    COUNT(DISTINCT campaign_id)::int AS campaigns
  FROM campaign_stats
  WHERE snapshot_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
),
campaign_data AS (
  SELECT json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'campaign_name', sub.campaign_name,
      'contacted',     sub.contacted,
      'emails_sent',   sub.emails_sent,
      'reply_rate_pct', sub.reply_rate_pct,
      'bounce_rate_pct', sub.bounce_rate_pct
    ) ORDER BY sub.emails_sent DESC
  ) AS data
  FROM (
    SELECT campaign_name, contacted, emails_sent, reply_rate_pct, bounce_rate_pct
    FROM v_campaign_performance
    WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
    ORDER BY emails_sent DESC
    LIMIT 6
  ) sub
),
domain_data AS (
  SELECT json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'domain',           domain,
      'avg_health_7d',    avg_health_7d,
      'sent_today',       sent_today,
      'total_daily_limit', total_daily_limit,
      'capacity_used_pct', capacity_used_pct,
      'accounts_below_95', accounts_below_95
    ) ORDER BY domain
  ) AS data
  FROM v_deliverability_by_domain
),
warmup_data AS (
  SELECT row_to_json(ws.*) AS data
  FROM warmup_stats ws
  ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
lead_data AS (
  SELECT json_object_agg(status, cnt) AS data
  FROM (
    SELECT status, SUM(count)::int AS cnt
    FROM lead_status_counts
    WHERE snapshot_at = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_at) FROM lead_status_counts)
    GROUP BY status
  ) sub
),
tag_data AS (
  SELECT json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'tag_name',              tag_name,
      'contacted_leads',       contacted_leads,
      'reply_rate_pct',        reply_rate_pct,
      'positive_of_replies_pct', positive_of_replies_pct,
      'auto_reply_rate_pct',   auto_reply_rate_pct,
      'bounce_rate_pct',       bounce_rate_pct
    ) ORDER BY contacted_leads DESC
  ) AS data
  FROM v_performance_by_tag
  WHERE contacted_leads > 0
)
SELECT
  (SELECT row_to_json(y.*) FROM yesterday_data y)  AS yesterday,
  (SELECT data FROM campaign_data)                  AS campaigns,
  (SELECT data FROM domain_data)                    AS domains,
  (SELECT data FROM warmup_data)                    AS warmup,
  (SELECT data FROM lead_data)                      AS leads,
  (SELECT data FROM tag_data)                       AS tags;

setup: 1. Create Postgres credential in N8N: Credentials → New → Postgres
Host: postgres (internal Docker hostname) | Port: 5432 | DB: outreach | User: n8n
Replace REPLACE_WITH_POSTGRES_CREDENTIAL_ID with the new credential ID
2. In Send Telegram node replace REPLACE_BOT_TOKEN and REPLACE_CHAT_ID
_readme.how_it_works: N8N runs one Postgres query (CTE) that collects ALL data in a single roundtrip, returns it as JSON columns. Code node formats the HTML message. HTTP Request sends directly to Telegram Bot API. No external scripts needed — entire logic lives in this workflow.
